prestazioni: AM-11 6.0L V12 (engine code: AM08) forced-induction conversion using a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, custom 3.5-inch stainless steel turbo manifolds by DART Machining, and a Motec M150 ECU with flex-fuel mapping for E85 compatibility, targeting 850whp on 28psi with a built CP-Carrillo forged crank, Manley H-beam rods, and JE 12.5:1 forged pistons

Full titanium 3.5-inch exhaust system by Armytrix with electronically controlled butterfly valves, paired with a custom X-pipe and secondary catalytic converters for backpressure optimization, retaining OEM-style quad outlets

Öhlins TTX46 coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), custom valving for the Vanquish’s aluminum-intensive chassis, and Eibach ERS 1400N/mm helper springs, paired with AST 5000 Series remote-reservoir dampers for the rear multi-link setup
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-VANQUISH widebody kit with carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser, featuring a 3-inch extended wheelbase for staggered 21x11.5 ET25 (front) and 22x13 ET35 (rear) Work Meister S1 3P wheels in custom 'Aston Racing Green' with gold accents

Full carbon fiber interior overhaul by Sabelt, including Recaro Pole Position seats with 6-point harnesses, a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, bolt-in with removable diagonal for daily use), and a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel with Alcantara and carbon fiber trim

Custom front splitter with active aero by Vorsteiner, featuring a 3-stage adjustable Gurney flap and integrated air curtains, paired with a fixed carbon fiber rear wing by RW Carbon (1,200mm span, 300mm chord) with dual-plane design for high-speed stability at 180+ mph
